title: URS Player Radar
description: A Fabric Minecraft player radar mod with multiple radar styles, player-head tracking, smooth movement, customizable coords display, and a polished in-game config menu with branding, scaling, positioning, and reset options.
body:
# Player Radar
## Advanced customizable HUD radar for Fabric

A polished Fabric Minecraft radar mod built for players who want a cleaner, more modern HUD experience. Player Radar adds smooth real-time player tracking, multiple radar styles, customizable coordinate placement, and a branded in-game settings menu so you can fine-tune the display to match your setup.

### Features

Multiple radar styles and layouts
Smooth player-head tracking
Adjustable radar size, padding, and scaling
Custom coordinate placement and sizing
Clean in-game config menu
Restore defaults option
Branded interface styling
### 
### Built For

PvP-focused gameplay
survival servers
streamlined HUD setups
players who want more control over their on-screen radar

### Customization
Fine-tune where your radar appears, how large it is, how coordinates are displayed, and which radar style fits your UI best.

### Summary
Player Radar is a sleek, customizable Fabric HUD mod designed to make player tracking feel cleaner, smoother, and more professional in-game.
